title: Ultra-Realistic Cinematic Portrait Photography
sourceTitle: Low Angle Cherry Blossom Cinematic Spring Portrait AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 9:16 ultra-realistic cinematic portrait of adult portrait subject in a white t-shirt beneath blooming cherry blossom trees. Subject: adult portrait subject in a white t-shirt stands under spring branches with short slightly messy wind-blown hair with loose strands moving in a gentle breeze, calm dreamy upward gaze, soft glowing skin, natural makeup, realistic texture, and photorealistic eyes. Scene: blooming cherry blossom trees during spring with soft sunlight through leaves with cherry blossom petals softly blurred in foreground and background, bright airy atmosphere, pastel colors, and soft blue sky through branches. Composition: Low-angle shot looking upward toward the face, foreground flowers partially covering the frame, strong layered depth, 85mm portrait lens, shallow depth of field, and creamy bokeh. Signature Elements: Preserved low angle cherry blossom cinematic spring portrait source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Professional lifestyle editorial portrait photography, candid emotional storytelling, premium camera quality, realistic lens blur, subtle filmic color grading, and ultra-detailed photorealistic finish. Color Palette: Pastel cherry blossom pinks, soft blue sky, white t-shirt tones, natural skin, gentle green branch accents, and bright airy spring color. Lighting: Soft natural daylight filtering through branches, beautiful dappled shadows across face and neck, high dynamic range, delicate hair highlights, and soft shadow transitions. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
